expertise.description: WordPress is an open-source content management system (CMS) that makes it easy to create and manage websites, blogs, and other types of web content.

expertise.name: Prepr
expertise.description: Prepr is a content management system (CMS) and personalization platform that helps businesses deliver personalized content to their audiences.

expertise.name: Contentful
expertise.description: Contentful is a headless content management system (CMS) that enables businesses to manage and deliver content across digital channels.

expertise.name: Piwik PRO
expertise.description: Piwik PRO is an analytics suite designed to ensure compliance with privacy laws and regulations, offering web analytics, tag management, customer data platform, and consent management.

expertise.name: Google Analytics
expertise.description: Google Analytics is a web analytics service offered by Google that tracks and reports website traffic, providing insights into user behavior and marketing effectiveness.

expertise.name: BigCommerce
expertise.description: BigCommerce is a leading cloud e-commerce platform for businesses of all sizes, providing a comprehensive solution for creating and managing online stores.

expertise.name: Sylius
expertise.description: Sylius is an open-source e-commerce platform for PHP, built on top of Symfony, that provides a customizable and scalable solution for creating online stores.

expertise.name: Elastic Path
expertise.description: Elastic Path is a headless e-commerce platform that provides the tools and flexibility needed to build and deliver unique commerce experiences.

expertise.name: VWO
expertise.description: VWO (Visual Website Optimizer) is a leading A/B testing and conversion optimization platform that helps businesses improve their website performance and user experience through experimentation and insights.

expertise.name: Ember.js
expertise.description: Ember.js is an open-source JavaScript web framework, based on the Model-View-ViewModel (MVVM) pattern. It allows developers to create scalable single-page web applications.

expertise.name: Blazor
expertise.description: Blazor is a free and open-source web framework that enables developers to create web applications using C# and HTML. It is part of the ASP.NET Core framework.

expertise.name: Razor
expertise.description: Razor is a markup syntax for embedding server-based code into web pages, part of the ASP.NET Core framework. It provides a productive syntax for combining HTML with C#.

expertise.name: Aurelia
expertise.description: Aurelia is a modern, open-source UI framework for web and mobile app development. It leverages simple conventions and is built on a next-generation JavaScript model.

expertise.name: JavaServer Faces (JSF)
expertise.description: JavaServer Faces (JSF) is a Java specification for building component-based user interfaces for web applications. It simplifies the development integration of web-based user interfaces.

expertise.name: Lean
expertise.description: Lean is a systematic method for waste minimization within a manufacturing system without sacrificing productivity. It is widely applied in various industries to improve efficiency and value.

expertise.name: Six Sigma
expertise.description: Six Sigma is a set of techniques and tools for process improvement. It seeks to improve the quality of output by identifying and removing the causes of defects and minimizing variability in manufacturing and business processes.

expertise.name: Agile
expertise.description: Agile is a set of principles for software development under which requirements and solutions evolve through the collaborative effort of self-organizing and cross-functional teams.

expertise.name: Scrum
expertise.description: Scrum is an Agile framework for managing complex projects. It provides a structured way for teams to work together to deliver a product incrementally, focusing on continuous improvement and collaboration.

expertise.name: PRINCE2
expertise.description: PRINCE2 (PRojects IN Controlled Environments) is a structured project management method and practitioner certification program that emphasizes dividing projects into manageable and controllable stages.

expertise.name: Copilot
expertise.description: Copilot refers to AI-powered tools that assist users by providing code suggestions, completing code, and enhancing productivity within development environments.

expertise.name: ChatGPT
expertise.description: ChatGPT is an AI language model developed by OpenAI that can generate human-like text, engage in conversation, answer questions, and assist with a wide range of tasks.

expertise.name: GitHub Copilot
expertise.description: GitHub Copilot is an AI-powered code completion tool that suggests code and entire functions in real-time, right from your editor.

expertise.name: SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework)
expertise.description: SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) is a set of organization and workflow patterns intended to guide enterprises in scaling lean and agile practices. It provides a knowledge base of proven best practices.

expertise.name: Project Management
expertise.description: Project management involves planning, executing, and overseeing projects to achieve specific goals within a specified timeline and budget. It includes methodologies, tools, and techniques to manage project activities.

expertise.name: LangGraph
expertise.description: LangGraph is a tool for building and visualizing complex language models and their interactions in a graphical interface.

expertise.name: LangChain
expertise.description: LangChain is a framework for developing applications powered by language models, focusing on connecting LLMs with external data.

expertise.name: HeyGen
expertise.description: HeyGen is a platform that leverages AI to generate realistic human avatars for video content, enhancing digital communication.

expertise.name: Autogen
expertise.description: Autogen is a tool that automates the generation of content, code, and data using advanced AI algorithms.

expertise.name: LM Studio
expertise.description: LM Studio is an integrated development environment for working with large language models, providing tools for training, testing, and deployment.

expertise.name: Ollama
expertise.description: Ollama is an AI-driven platform that specializes in natural language processing to enhance communication and automate tasks.

expertise.name: Auto-GPT
expertise.description: Auto-GPT is an experimental open-source application that showcases the capabilities of GPT models in performing autonomous tasks.

expertise.name: Devin
expertise.description: Devin is an AI-powered tool designed to assist developers by generating code snippets, optimizing workflows, and automating repetitive tasks.

expertise.name: Pinecone
expertise.description: Pinecone is a vector database designed to power AI and machine learning applications by enabling fast and scalable similarity search.

expertise.name: Chroma
expertise.description: Chroma is a vector database built for AI applications, allowing developers to store and query embeddings efficiently.

expertise.name: Weaviate
expertise.description: Weaviate is an open-source vector search engine that enables developers to build applications using AI-driven semantic search.

expertise.name: Faiss
expertise.description: Faiss is a library developed by Facebook AI Research for efficient similarity search and clustering of dense vectors.

expertise.name: Inbisco
expertise.description: Management Systemen - voor controle over organisaties.
